author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: PASS 1 implementation (754a hub_v3 infra). Plan: (1) sibling-preserving tree core in hub_v3.rs (read_tree_entries via ls-tree, write_tree_with supporting one nesting level, refactor append/commit_log_bytes/commit_blob_to_ref/commit_files_to_ref onto it); (2) heartbeat write/read on agent refs (reuse locks::Heartbeat schema); (3) agent requests on refs with writer-ownership layout requests-out/<target>--<ulid>.json and requests-ack/<ulid>.json (one nesting level); (4) compact_v3 in hub_v3.rs (reduce RefHubSource -> checkpoint commit_blob_to_ref + push_ref_with_lease + REQ-11 own-ref prune only after checkpoint push). v2 finding: requests are plain JSON with requested_by fingerprint, NOT git-signed; poll::process_pending trusts local cache because sync already rejected bad-signer commits at fetch; reduce only WARNS on unsigned events. Mirroring: verify-on-read deferred to same trust model (no per-request sig gate added).
